text: No person shall drive an off-highway motor vehicle at a speed greater than is reasonable or prudent and in no event at a speed which endangers the safety of other persons or property.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 5. Off-Highway Vehicle Operating Rules [38280 - 38321]
#### Article 3. Speed Laws [38305 - 38310]
##### § 38305

No person shall drive an off-highway motor vehicle at a speed greater than is reasonable or prudent and in no event at a speed which endangers the safety of other persons or property.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1093.)*

subsections.text: No person shall drive an off-highway motor vehicle at a speed greater than is reasonable or prudent and in no event at a speed which endangers the safety of other persons or property.
